round2_improvement_notes.linguistic: Agent provided no output in either round; no improvement possible.
round2_improvement_notes.landscape: Agent synthesized cross-agent evidence (botanical profile) to refine confidence and lower the probability of the Canada hypothesis.
round2_improvement_notes.botanics: Agent synthesized cross-agent evidence (infrastructure/architecture) to reinforce the US West Coast hypothesis.
round2_improvement_notes.regulatory: Agent synthesized cross-agent evidence (botanical profile) to differentiate between US and Canada based on landscaping style.
round2_improvement_notes.meta: Agent synthesized cross-agent evidence (botanical profile) to strengthen the US West Coast conclusion.

verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly identified the lack of linguistic evidence and effectively synthesized the landscape, botanics, regulatory, and meta findings. The reasoning correctly prioritized the specific botanical evidence (Monterey Cypress) as the primary differentiator between the US and Canada, leading to the correct conclusion.
